Real bug found live: the panel stuck around on every route of a React SPA

Two compounding causes, both exercised here: (1) client-side route changes (pushState) never fire a real page load, so nothing re-evaluates whether the CURRENT route still qualifies; (2) some SPAs keep every tab's content mounted at once, just CSS-hidden, so a naive field count picks up fields from tabs the user isn't even looking at.

running…
